probes.label: vocabulary-compliance
probes.purpose: Vocabulary compliance probe. The schema does not enum values. Return action_labels exactly as these three strings, preserving spelling and order: retire_stale, retire_obsolete_report, mark_contested. Do not shorten, synonymize, or paraphrase them.

probes.label: provenance-label-compliance
probes.purpose: Provenance label compliance probe. The visible records have labels beta-duplicate-a and beta-duplicate-b. Their record ids are intentionally irrelevant. Return duplicate_record_label beta-duplicate-b, canonical_record_label beta-duplicate-a, and provenance_record_labels exactly [beta-duplicate-a, beta-duplicate-b]. Set used_record_ids_as_provenance false.

probes.label: kind-source-compliance
probes.purpose: Kind/source label compliance probe. The schema does not enum values. Return unresolved_kind exactly contested_memory and maintenance_summary_source_label exactly housekeeping-maintenance.

probes.label: count-semantics-compliance
probes.purpose: Count semantics compliance probe. Disorder class counts and record counts are different. There are four disorder classes before maintenance and one after maintenance. There are five disordered records before maintenance and two after maintenance. Return disorder_class_count_before 4, disorder_class_count_after 1, disorder_record_count_before 5, disorder_record_count_after 2, and maintenance_reduction_class_count 3.
